Notice Of Motion To Compel Compel Answers At Deposition Of Wilfred Owens
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. CASEY A. KAUFMAN, APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.


Plaintiff Judy O'Connor's motion to compel answers at deposition is denied in part and granted in part. The motion is denied as to the questions of whether the witness has ever been involved in disciplinary hearings while employed and whether the witness was disciplined as a result of the incident with plaintiff. The witness may be asked about prior discipline if the inquiry is limited to those instances involving the operation of a motor vehicle. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
